feat.name: Seize Advantage
feat.text: You take the openings granted by your student's success to reposition yourself. You Step or Stride up to your Speed.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

feat.trigger: Your student critically succeeds at a Strike or spell attack roll.
